# Setup Guide

Detailed instructions for setting up AI Dispatcher for your organization.

## Prerequisites

- An active AI Dispatcher account
- Admin access to your field service management platform
- Your technician roster with skills and availability

## Workspace Configuration

### Company Information

Go to **Settings > Company** to configure your business details, including company name, address, and contact information.

### Business Hours

Set your company's operating hours in **Settings > Company > Schedule**. These hours are used when calculating technician availability and job scheduling windows.

### Service Areas

Define your service coverage zones in **Settings > Service Areas**. You can create areas using:
- **Radius** — Circle around a center point
- **Polygon** — Custom geographic boundary
- **Zip Codes** — List of covered postal codes

## Team Setup

Add technicians in **Settings > Team Members** with:
- Contact information
- Skills and certifications
- Service area assignments
- Availability schedules

## Integration Setup

See the [Integrations](/integrations/fieldcamp) section for detailed instructions on connecting your FSM platform.
